browserSession.note: Keep the signed-in VPS Chrome profile open for Gmail, Gumroad, Pinterest, and any other browser-backed services.

phases.title: Product Factory Expansion
phases.goal: Finish the second digital asset and grow the store catalog toward five products.

phases.title: Store Conversion Automation
phases.goal: Improve storefront conversion and Gumroad-native sales flows.

phases.title: Growth Automation
phases.goal: Create no-cost traffic and promotion workflows that support store sales.

phases.title: Autonomous Operations Hardening
phases.goal: Improve ImonEngine, VPS workflows, and operational resilience for the store lane.

phases.title: Final Review And Notification
phases.goal: Close out the roadmap, update docs, sync the VPS, and email completion.

phases.title: Continuous Store Operations
phases.goal: Keep seeding, staging, and building low-support store products after the first roadmap email.

notes: The repo-controlled autopilot is paused by owner request while the control-room office explorer is being refactored.
The first Gumroad product is live.
The second Gumroad product is live and should be tracked as published inside ImonEngine.
The VPS cron runner is now the primary scheduler for continuous store operations.
The Codex desktop automation and Windows scheduled task should remain paused unless the VPS runner is down.
Future scalable businesses should use one umbrella Facebook Page with multiple niche Instagram identities beneath it.
If Playwright cannot reattach to the signed-in browser, use the CDP fallback script against the active Chrome DevTools session on the VPS.
Verified exports are the only allowed source for earnings, reinvestment, and cashout decisions; inferred or manual-unverified financial data must stay excluded from those calculations.
Engine sync now maintains a real-world organization control plane with departments, positions, workflow ownership, approval routes, memory boundaries, and office-view snapshots.
The first control-room dashboard is generated from the control plane at runtime/ops/control-room/index.html.
